decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to its base_record_id route_b46-local-2012, which exists in the registry with matching source_ids and submission_ids. The closest match is the observation's own canonical record — no link to a different record is needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B46 is the second busiest bus route in NYC
B46 local buses make all stops.

proposed_relations.description: Both are service variants of the B46 route on the Utica Avenue corridor, described together on the same page of the source.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B46 local buses make all stops. B46 Limited-Stop buses operate 7 days a week. These buses make limited stops between DeKalb Av/Malcolm X Blvd and Avenue H/Utica Av, and make all stops along the rest of the route.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B46 Limited-Stop buses operate 7 days a week. These buses make limited stops between DeKalb Av/Malcolm X Blvd and Avenue H/Utica Av, and make all stops along the rest of the route.
